channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Tesla Cybercab gets huge nod of support from Texas DOT official
item.description: The Tesla Cybercab got a huge nod of support from a Texas Department of Transportation official, who said the all-electric ride-hailing vehicle is “a tangible example of how quickly our transportation system is evolving.” The Cybercab was present at the Texas Department of Transportation’s Texas ...

item.title: Uber and Lucid pick Houston as next robotaxi market as battle with Waymo, Tesla heats up
item.description: Uber and Lucid are expanding their robotaxi venture, naming Houston as the second planned market for the autonomous ride-hailing service the two companies are building with self-driving startup Nuro.

item.title: Uber’s Lucid-powered robotaxis are heading to Houston next
item.description: Uber , Nuro, and Lucid have picked Houston as the second city for their planned robotaxi service, with the launch in the Texas city expected in mid-2027.

item.title: Cathie Wood Swaps Tesla for SpaceX in $529M Elon Musk Pivot
item.description: ARK sold Tesla and bought $529M of SpaceX, the world's biggest IPO, the same day. The reason goes beyond Musk loyalty.

item.title: Uber Expands Robotaxi Ambitions With WeRide Zurich Launch, Stellantis-Wayve Global Partnership
item.description: The company disclosed two separate updates on Wednesday regarding its plans to scale its robotaxi services internationally.

item.title: Elon Musk's Robotaxi Goals Get A Boost As Texas DOT Official Hails Tesla Cybercab
item.description: A Texas Department of Transportation (DOT) executive has backed Tesla Inc.‘s (NASDAQ:TSLA) robotaxi efforts, in what could be a boost for Elon Musk‘s self-driving goals. A Significant Shift In Mobility Marc Williams, the Executive Director of the Texas DOT, took to the social media platform Linke...

item.title: TSLA Stock In Focus: Could Optimus Be The Missing Link Between Tesla And SpaceX?
item.description: Elon Musk has outlined a vision in which large groups of Tesla’s humanoid robots could eventually function as self-replicating machines in space.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Faces Senate Inquiry Over FSD Safety Claims In Europe Too
item.description: Two U.S. senators have requested a federal investigation into Tesla's self-published safety data for its Full Self-Driving system, questioning whether the company has overstated real-world safety performance. Regulators in Sweden and the Netherlands have also accused Tesla of providing misleading...

item.title: SpaceX Stock Will Face a Reckoning When Investor Lockups End
item.description: Coming into Wednesday trading, shares were up almost 50% from their $135 IPO price, valuing the company north of $2.6 trillion.

item.title: 'Elon Is Scared Of This Conversation:' Democrat Fires Back At Musk's Subsidy Defense
item.description: Sen. Ed Markey (D-Mass.) hit back at Tesla Inc. and Space Exploration Technologies Corp.

item.title: TSLA Stock Falls – Senator Raises Concerns Over Tesla’s ‘Misleading’ FSD Safety Data
item.description: In a letter sent on June 16 to NHTSA Administrator Jonathan Morrison, Democratic Senators Edward Markey and Richard Blumenthal said Tesla has used “misleading and incomplete” statistics to promote FSD.

item.title: The Latest Way BYD Is Topping Tesla
item.description: BYD isn't slowing down in just about any metric, but its recent push to expand its powerful supercharger network is impressive.

item.title: Tesla's AI5 Chip Recently Completed Tape-Out. Here's Why This Could Be the Most Important Development in the Company's Transition From Automaker to AI Giant.
item.description: The electric vehicle manufacturer's newest semiconductor chip could help it bring its AI ambitions to fruition.

item.title: SpaceX Options Are Heavily Traded on First Day; Call Volume is Fifth Highest
item.description: As long as SpaceX remains volatile and in the news, there is apt to continue to be heavy trading in its options, especially the calls.

item.title: Tesla urges New Jersey owners to oppose new bill that could block Robotaxi
item.description: Tesla has launched a direct campaign targeting its customers in New Jersey, sending emails that warn of pending legislation that could effectively block true driverless technology in the state. The email focuses on Senate Bill S.1677 and Assembly Bill A.3968, measures intended to create a three-y...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Declines More Than Market: Some Information for Investors
item.description: The latest trading day saw Tesla (TSLA) settling at $404.66, representing a -1.58% change from its previous close.

item.title: Elon Musk Keeps Getting Richer. Here's How His Wealth Blew Past $1 Trillion.
item.description: The world's richest man keeps getting richer, as investors clamor for a piece of the action.

item.title: Tesla Seeks Customer Backing To Oppose New Jersey Driverless Vehicle Bills
item.description: Tesla says the proposed rules are overly strict and would effectively block its autonomous technology from operating in the state.

item.title: Elon Musk Just Delivered Fantastic News for ASML Stock Investors
item.description: Tesla and SpaceX are all-in on building a massive semiconductor manufacturing capability, and that's great news for the European company.

item.title: What investors should know before hopping on SpaceX options trades
item.description: While SpaceX (SPCX) holds onto stock gains in Tuesday's session, the options market has been abuzz today as more traders chase options contracts on the space company. YieldMax ETFs chief strategist Mike Khouw comes on Market Domination to speak more about what retail investors should beware of wh...

item.title: More Robo-Taxis Are Coming. This Stock Is Getting a Boost.
item.description: Mobileye plans to launch a robo-taxi service but faces competition from the likes of Alphabet’s Waymo and Tesla.

item.title: Waymo taps fleet giant Element to scale its robotaxi service
item.description: Waymo has tapped fleet management company Element to help keep its robotaxis charged, maintained, and on the road as the company expands into more cities.

item.title: SpaceX Stock Faces Tesla-Style Crash Fears as $3 Trillion Valuation Sparks Debate
item.description: SpaceX stock faces Tesla-style crash fears as SPCX nears a $3 trillion valuation, dividing bulls and bears on a thin float.

item.title: Tesla’s Navigation Nightmare: Why the easiest part of FSD might be the hardest
item.description: Turn-by-turn navigation is not new technology. For over two decades, drivers have relied on Garmin, TomTom, and later smartphone apps like Google Maps and Waze to receive precise, reliable directions. These systems have guided millions safely through unfamiliar cities, highways, and backroads wit...

item.title: What Led JPMorgan to Revisit Its Tesla Inc (TSLA) Stock Rating?
item.description: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of billionaire Ken Fisher’s top high growth stock picks. Tesla shares have gained roughly 27% over the past year. On June 5, JPMorgan upgraded Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA) stock rating to Neutral from Underweight and raised the price target to $475 from $145.

item.title: The Battle of the Musks: Why Cathie Wood Sold Tesla Stock to Buy SpaceX
item.description: Cathie Wood just trimmed Tesla and piled into SpaceX after its record-breaking IPO. Let’s see why one of Musk's biggest believers is changing course.

item.title: SpaceX Rally Lifts Valor's Stake to Nearly $97 Billion After 43% Gain
item.description: Antonio Gracias' net worth reached $24.4 billion as SpaceX shares climbed 43% since Friday.

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck driver gets pickup seized for ‘legitimate concerns’ in UK
item.description: A Tesla Cybertruck driver in the United Kingdom had their all-electric pickup seized by local police in the Greater Manchester area after the department cited “legitimate concerns.” Last Thursday, police saw the pickup on the roads and decided to pull the driver over. Greater Manchester Police sa...

item.title: Anthony Pompliano Wants Elon Musk To Merge Tesla And SpaceX: 'Give Us One Company To Bet On'
item.description: Entrepreneur and investor Anthony Pompliano said Sunday that Elon Musk should merge Tesla Inc. and Space Exploration Technologies Corp., arguing that public investors deserve a single company through which they can back what he called “this generation’s greatest entrepreneur.” The...

item.title: Hyundai is closing in on Chevy as the #2 EV brand in the US
item.description: Hyundai is on track for its sixth straight year of record sales in the US. In the EV market, Hyundai has its sights set on Chevrolet as it looks to become the second-best-selling brand behind Tesla.

item.title: 4 Reasons to Think Twice Before Buying SpaceX Stock Right Now
item.description: If you're on the fence about diving into this name in the middle of the hype, this might help you sort out your decision.

item.title: Famed Venture Capital Fund Says this Stock is Like Buying Nvidia in 2023
item.description: When a Sequoia Capital partner compares a freshly public stock to NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) three years ago, investors pay attention. That is exactly what Sean MacGuire did on CNBC this week, arguing that “SpaceX right now is more like Nvidia three years ago than Tesla.” He went further on his persona...

item.title: Tesla: The SpaceX Optionality
Elon Musk could lose nearly $1 trillion and still be the world's richest person
item.description: Tuesday's spike in SpaceX stock boosted the fortune of the world's richest man by a cool $110 billion.

item.title: Tesla: The Recovery Is Just Another Illusion
Apple is developing the missing link for Tesla to get CarPlay: report
item.description: A new report claims that Apple is in the process of developing what would be the missing link for Tesla to get CarPlay. Apple and Tesla have been reportedly working together for some time to give Tesla owners the opportunity to utilize CarPlay within their vehicles. While many owners are more tha...

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Stock Gets Fair Value Bump As Analysts Debate AI And Demand
item.description: Tesla now carries an updated fair value estimate of about US$420.55 per share, up from roughly US$415.30, a modest shift that still matters if you are tracking long term assumptions. The change sits against a split analyst backdrop, with some pointing to autonomy and physical AI to justify higher...

item.title: The Mag 7 plus these three AI companies make up the new Fab 10
item.description: The Magnificent Seven plus SpaceX (SPCX), Anthropic (ANTH.PVT), and OpenAI (OPAI.PVT) equal the Fab 10. Could this trio of AI mega-IPOs bring enthusiasm back to the tech space previously dominated by the Mag 7? Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Ines Ferré and Innovator From Goldman Sachs Asset Manage...

item.title: SpaceX Launches Start of Acquisition Spree with Cursor After Historic IPO
item.description: The market has spent years viewing SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) primarily as a rocket company, but that narrative no longer fits. The company’s historic IPO, which raised $85.7 billion after underwriters exercised the so-called “greenshoe” overallotment — with the stock currently valued at more than $2.7...

item.title: Cathie Wood's ARKK Cuts BMNR Stake On Bitmine's Holdings Pop, Joins Trims Of Roku, Tesla, AMD In No-Buy Monday
item.description: Sister funds ARKQ and ARKX reported only sales on Monday, with no buys across the three Wood-managed ETFs that traded.

item.title: Tesla Stock Traded Its Affordable Car Dream For An AI Moonshot
item.description: As the company's core auto business shrinks, management has gone quiet on its promise of cheaper EVs, betting everything on a future that's years away and will cost billions.

item.title: It Took SpaceX Just 1 Day to Reach a Milestone Tesla Has Never Achieved. Which Elon Musk-Led Stock Is the Better Buy in June?
item.description: SpaceX and Tesla are leading players in cutting-edge markets, which could make both growth stocks appealing to risk-tolerant investors.

item.title: SpaceX Jumps 14% Past $2.9 Trillion, Closes In on Microsoft, Apple After $60 Billion Cursor Deal
item.description: Shares of SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) are up 14% in early trading Tuesday, zooming to $219. This pushes the newly public rocket and connectivity giant’s market cap past $2.9 trillion, putting SPCX stock within striking distance of the world’s biggest tech names. The trigger is a blockbuster acquisition ...

item.title: Tesla deliveries get a big boost in expectations from Wall Street
item.description: Tesla deliveries got a big boost in expectations from Wall Street firm Goldman Sachs, who believes the company will report some stronger-than-expected numbers when the second quarter comes to an end in the coming weeks. Goldman Sachs has raised its vehicle delivery forecast for Tesla ( NASDAQ: TS...

item.title: Elon Musk Just Made More Money in 6.5 Hours Than Warren Buffett Made in His Entire Life.
item.description: Yesterday handed Elon Musk one of the largest single-day wealth gains in recorded financial history. SpaceX shares ripped from $160.95 to $192.50, and Forbes’ real-time billionaires tracker put Musk’s one-day paper gain at $164.8 billion. Warren Buffett, who had his own “good day” with an estimat...

item.title: Tesla Stock Can’t Escape SpaceX’s Gravity
item.description: Investors will get new fundamental information for Tesla when it reports second quarter deliveries in early July.

item.title: Tesla ‘Robotaxis’ are not crashing because they are not running
item.description: Tesla didn’t report a single at-fault “Robotaxi” crash in the latest NHTSA autonomous-vehicle data — its only fresh incident was a Model Y getting rear-ended while stopped, clearly the other driver’s fault. That sounds like good news for Tesla’s safety record. But live fleet data points to the re...

item.title: SpaceX makes first acquisition post-IPO with coding leader Cursor
item.description: SpaceX has exercised its option to acquire Cursor, the innovative AI coding company, in an all-stock transaction valued at $60 billion. The deal, announced on June 16, marks a significant step in SpaceX’s expansion into advanced artificial intelligence, building on months of close collaboration b...

item.title: SpaceX IPO: What Your $5,000 Investment Could Be Worth
item.description: The company's valuation prices in lofty growth expectations.

item.title: Ex-Tesla exec builds the home heat pump Tesla gave up for robots
item.description: Drew Baglino spent nearly two decades building Tesla’s batteries, motors, and power electronics. Now the former Tesla SVP is quietly building the one home energy product Tesla talked up for years and never shipped: a residential heat pump. His startup, Sadi Thermal Machines, is a direct bet on an...
